mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 10%, immediate market repricing occurs due to recession fears, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in greater than 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 10.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms synchronized consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive MoM changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with out-of-sample accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recovery phases, rapid rebounds in industrial production indicate restored supply chain capacity, which eliminates inventory bottlenecks and generates positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO rebounds during recovery phases do not precede positive 20-day SPX returns with a t-statistic below 1.5 over historical recovery windows.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening labor market conditions that support consumer spending forecasts, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 5-day forward returns across all market regimes with Rank IC consistently near zero.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation accelerates above 3.5%, anticipated central bank tightening compresses equity multiples, resulting in negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in greater than 60% of months where CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales indicates weakening economic momentum, which triggers risk-off positioning and negative monthly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: GDPC1-RSAFS divergence fails to predict negative 20-day returns with classification accuracy below 50% in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, contractions in industrial production reflect credit constraints that suppress corporate output, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening cycles do not precede negative 5-day SPX returns with a signal Sharpe ratio below 0.1.
